name: 7 up Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pineapple Cream Pudding Mix, or Vanilla Pudding
recipeInstructions:
CAKE:
Mix all ingredients and beat well.
In a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan, bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until done.
FROSTING: Mix together sugar, flour, margarine, eggs. Cook until it thickens.
Remove from heat and beat well.
Add coconut and beat until thick enough to spread on cake.
